steps.title: Spot the contradiction
steps.content: The word “However” signals that new evidence contradicts the original hypothesis. The climate shift occurred too early to have caused the extinction around 200,000 years ago, so the hypothesis explaining the extinction by that climate change is now wrong. The evidence forces paleontologists to respond to this contradiction.

steps.title: Match the required action
steps.content: ”Revise” means to reconsider and change your view based on new information—exactly what scientists must do when their hypothesis is contradicted by evidence. “Interpret” applies to analyzing meaning, “recollect” to remembering, and “introduce” to presenting something new; none fits a scientist's response to contradictory evidence. That matches choice A — A is correct.
